mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_post WHERE status = 'PUB'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(view_count), 0) FROM tb_post WHERE status = 'PUB'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_system_log WHERE request_uri ~ '^/api/post/[0-9]+$' AND http_method_type = 'GET' AND status = 'SUCC' AND created_at >= #{todayStart} AND created_at < #{tomorrowStart}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT category_id) FROM tb_post WHERE status = 'PUB'

SELECT CAST(created_at AT TIME ZONE #{zoneId} AS DATE) AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM tb_system_log WHERE request_uri ~ '^/api/post/[0-9]+$' AND http_method_type = 'GET' AND status = 'SUCC' AND created_at >= #{from} AND created_at < #{to} GROUP BY CAST(created_at AT TIME ZONE #{zoneId} AS DATE) ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT p.id, p.subject, cat.name AS CATEGORY_NAME, p.view_count AS VIEW_COUNT FROM tb_post p LEFT JOIN tb_category cat ON p.category_id = cat.id WHERE p.status = 'PUB' AND p.public_access = true ORDER BY p.view_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT cat.name AS CATEGORY_NAME, COUNT(p.id) AS POST_COUNT FROM tb_post p INNER JOIN tb_category cat ON p.category_id = cat.id WHERE p.status = 'PUB' GROUP BY cat.name ORDER BY POST_COUNT DESC

SELECT t.name AS TAG_NAME, COUNT(m.post_id) AS POST_COUNT FROM tb_post_tag_map m INNER JOIN tb_tag t ON m.tag_id = t.id INNER JOIN tb_post p ON m.post_id = p.id WHERE p.status = 'PUB' GROUP BY t.name ORDER BY POST_COUNT DESC LIMIT #{limit}
